evidence.rule_summary_from_author: ActiveDataRemovalMechanism has column type data_removal_mechanism, defined as an enumeration type over values 0 through 7 with mechanisms associated to numeric enumeration values. It is not a boolean column, so host Set values True or False cannot be accepted by coercing them to enumeration values 1 or 0.

source_snippets.text: 4.2.5.1 Data_removal_mechanism The data_removal_mechanism type is defined in Table 30 for Opal: Table 30 - data_removal_mechanism Type Table Addition ```json [ { "UID": "00 00 00 05 00 00 04 20", "Name": "data_removal_mechanism", "Format": "Enumeration_Type, 0, 7" } ] ``` Table 31 defines the enumeration values. The mechanisms associated with each Enumeration Value are defined in Table 10. Table 31 - data_removal_mechanism Enumeration Values ```json [ { "Enumeration Value": 0, "Associated Value": "Overwrite Data Erase" }, { "Enumeration Value": 1, "Associated Value": "Block Erase" }, { "Enumeration Value": 2, "Associated Value": "Cryptographic Erase" }, { "Enumeration Value": "3–4", "Associated Value": "Reserved" }, { "Enumeration Value": 5, "Associated Value": "Vendor Specific Erase" }, { "Enumeration Value": "6-7", "Associated Value": "Reserved" } ] ```

4.2.6.1 DataRemovalMechanism (ObjectTable) The DataRemovalMchanism table is defined in Table 32 Table 32 - DataRemovalMechansim Table Description ```json [ { "Column Number": "0x00", "Column Name": "UID", "IsUnique": "", "Column Type": "uid" }, { "Column Number": "0x01", "Column Name": "ActiveDataRemovalMechanism", "IsUnique": "", "Column Type": "data_removal_mechanism" } ] ```

4.2.6.1.2 ActiveDataRemovalMechanism This column value selects which Data Removal Mechanism in the Supported Data Removal Mechanism field in the Supported Data Removal Mechanism feature descriptor is active and will be used to remove data upon execution of the Revert method, the RevertSP method or the GenKey method. If an attempt is made to set the ActiveDataRemovalMechanism column value to an unsupported value of the data_removal_mechanism type, then the Set method invocation SHALL result in the method failing with the status INVALID_PARAMETER.

output_schema.label: PASS or FAIL
output_schema.rationale: short explanation grounded in source text
output_schema.concerns: empty string if none; otherwise state ambiguity
